allow: Bash(DOCKER_BUILDKIT=0 COMPOSE_DOCKER_CLI_BUILD=0 docker compose build --no-cache frontend)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['name']\) for r in data.get\('results',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['name']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(json.load\(open\('/dev/stdin','r'\)\) if False else x, dict\)]")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json data=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in data.get\('results',[]\): print\(r['name']\) ")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec frontend nginx -t)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec postgres psql -U clickstream -d clickstream -c "\\dt live_sessions")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose exec postgres psql -U clickstream -d clickstream -c "SELECT schemaname, tablename, tableowner FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename='live_sessions';")
